parameters: Even after summer started in full force, I continued to spend my days
lazing around, just as I did during the free attendance days.
Come to think of it, isn't today one of Shino's shift days?
Maybe I should get a part time job like her too...
She did say she might come home late so, I guess I'll go pick her up today too.
Since I'm just a bit... worried about her. Just a bit.
Of course, I do feel embarrassed about going to pick her up but
I'm still her boyfriend so... let's just err on the safe side.
Or so I told myself, as I waited for her shift to be over.
アニメーションタイプ = def
\SE[8]Nn, then if I apply that formula here... wah, I did it.
Even I can do it when I put my mind to it, huh~♪
\SE[31-nb]If I can solve the next question too, a glass of the new frappe
should be fine, right?--... Fufufuh, time to roll my sleeves up~♪
I happened to stop by the cafe, where I saw Shino studying super hard.
She always works hard with her studies, her part time job, and the
housework too. I felt a desire boiling inside me, to support her.
...Maybe I should show off my manly side to her too, every so often.
With that thought in mind, before talking to her, I headed to the counter
and ordered 2 of the new frappe that they just added, before sitting down next to her.
\SM[jump]\sa[121]\SE[8]Wah, when did you!? Sorry sorry, I didn't notice you at all~
\sa[123]\SE[19]Eh? This is for me? Eh--, it's the new frappe! You sure?
\sa[128]\se[31-nb]Wuh, did I say all that out loud... earlier?
Time to take a break then. Don't mind me~♥
With her studies on pause, we chatted and chatted and before we
knew it, the sun was starting to set on us.
Thanks for the treat--, \n[1]. I'll return the favour next time.
...I was here to cheer her on, did I just get in her way instead?
But she looked satisfied enough, so it probably was fine.
スライドスピード = def
Spending chill time in a cafe like this right from the morning... I'm so cool--
My day starts along with a cup of coffee.
I see. So it's between me, and a cup of coffee, huh? (?)
A cafe latte ain't bad once in a while either.
Caffeine really does boost your concentration something fierce.
There's nothing for me to concentrate on though.
Maybe I should just move to the apartment complex behind this place...
Spending chill time in a cafe like this during lunch... I'm so cool--
My day goes by with a cup of coffee.
My usual blend, on my usual seat. Kuuuh~!
A cafe mocha ain't bad once in a while either.
Caffeine really does blow away your sleepiness something fierce....
It was worth lining up at the door right from 4 AM.
Maybe I'll just transfer my current residence address to this chair...
Spending chill time in a cafe like this along with the setting sun... I'm so cool--
My day ends with a cup of coffee.
I spend so much time here, the staff is almost like family to me at this point.
A cappuccino ain't bad once in a while either.
Caffeine really does fill up your bladder something fierce....
Maybe I should attach a mailbox to this desk...
Chilling it in a cafe like this is nice too, isn't it~?
Yeah~ (It'd be great if we could go to the hotel next door too though.)
What do you want to do after this? Ah, wanna hit up that place next door?
Eh!? Next door!? (The hotel?) For real!? You sure?
I can't believe how much you're into karaoke, you're such a riot~
Say, how many girls did you date before you met me?
Eh, a w-w-w-w-w-whole lot of them, you know?! I took up every offer, you know!
(So I'm his first girlfriend, huh? What an adorable guy...)
So, how about it? Wanna try dating?
Eh!? We haven't been dating until now?!
I'm joking. Your reactions are so cute~
Oh, right. Say, what sort of men do you like?
Nnnn~, men like the guy right in front of me right now... I guess?
Want to play a game of rock paper scissors? I'll do anything you want if you win.
But in return, if you lose, we'd have to split up... how about it?
Ahahah--, you really are just so adorable~♥
It's not really any more or less efficient, but working in a cafe
really gives you a feeling of pride and accomplishment, you know?
I'm writing erotica in a cafe with a completely straight face...
Between a cucumber and an eggplant, which would be better...
Watching couples really helps me get going, you know?
I put my lips on the tip of that moist, pink bud....
Would "cherry colored" fit better, I wonder... What a bother...
I wonder, does anal feel good....
Won't a wonderful prince just appear in my life~...

Doing it all day from sunrise to sunset with just a few breaks in between just sounds so 
dreamy~...

They say that people with high sex drives tend to grow out their hair more often, but is 
that true?
I wonder how it'd feel to be licked from both sides at the same time...
I wonder how flexible you'd need to be to lick your own...
Being done from behind while I'm sleeping just sounds so dreamy~...
Is it true that taking it on your face makes your skin all nice and smooth...?
I want to have someone play with all my tips while their thing is inside me~~♥
(Maybe I should try sampling this schoolboy in fron t of me...?)

Say, doesn't the idea of a deal where you can put it in if you win at rock paper scissors... 
sound real nice?
Having sushi eaten off me sounds so dreamy...
I don't think I care about specific genders anymore, honestly...
